working_title: Prepare a safe WordPress draft with an editorial agent
user_question: How can an editorial agent prepare a WordPress draft safely?
direct_answer: Validate accepted inputs, use draft-only permissions, and stop before publication.
unique_value: A reproducible draft-only workflow with explicit rollback and handoff gates.
ai_disclosure: AI assisted with research and drafting; a human editor reviews publication.
update_trigger: WordPress post status or MCPWP authorization behavior changes.
